name: knowledge-management
description: Sync your Word docs and Google Docs into a searchable local index Claude can use without loading full files.

documents_path.title: Documents folder
documents_path.description: Local folder to scan for Word documents (.docx). Subfolders are included.

google_docs_enabled.title: Sync Google Docs?
google_docs_enabled.description: Include Google Docs in your knowledge base.

google_drive_folder_id.title: Google Drive folder ID (optional)
google_drive_folder_id.description: Restrict to a specific folder. Find the ID in the Drive URL when you open the folder. Leave empty for all docs.

sync_interval_minutes.title: Sync interval (minutes)
sync_interval_minutes.description: How often to check for updated documents while Claude is running. Default: 60.
